title: rinorea calcicola
intro: Rinorea calcicola, also known as the calcicole vine, is a plant species that belongs to the Violaceae family. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation. Rinorea calcicola is traditionally prepared as a decoction or infusion, where the roots or leaves of the plant are boiled or steeped in hot water to make a herbal remedy.
